variables._solutionName: Check Point Exposure Management IoC Intelligence

properties.displayName: Check Point Exposure Management IoC Intelligence Connector

connectorUiConfig.title: Check Point Exposure Management IoC Intelligence Connector
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: Check Point provides a Microsoft Sentinel integration to ingest high-fidelity Indicators of Compromise (IoCs) from the Infinity External Risk Management solution into Microsoft Sentinel. This connector incrementally pulls the premium IOC feed — including malicious IPs, domains, URLs, and file hashes — enriched with confidence, severity, malicious classification, kill chain stage, blocking and uniqueness flags, malware types, and CVE/campaign associations.

customs.name: Check Point Cyberint API Key, Argos URL, and Customer Name
customs.description: The connector API key, Argos URL, and Customer Name are required

instructionSteps.title: Connect Check Point Exposure Management IoC Intelligence to Microsoft Sentinel
instructionSteps.description:
To enable the connector provide the required information below and click on Connect.

**Argos URL** — Cyberint API URL for your tenant (e.g. `https://your_tenant.cyberint.io`)

**API Token** — Cyberint API access token

**Customer Name** — Company (client) name associated with your Cyberint instance

parameters.label: Customer Name
parameters.placeholder: Company (client) name associated with your Cyberint instance
parameters.name: customername

dataFlows.transformKql:
source
| extend _parsed = todatetime(added_to_feed)
| extend ingestion_used_fallback_time = isnull(_parsed)
| extend TimeGenerated = coalesce(_parsed, now())
| project-away _parsed

inputs.value: Hash: @{items('For_each_FileHash')?['Value']} — Enrichment failed; the IOC could not be enriched.

inputs.name: EnrichmentComment
inputs.value: Domain: @{items('For_each_Domain')?['DomainName']} — Malicious: @{json(string(body('Enrich_Domain')))?['malicious']} | Confidence: @{json(string(body('Enrich_Domain')))?['confidence']} | Severity: @{json(string(body('Enrich_Domain')))?['severity']} | Activity: @{json(string(body('Enrich_Domain')))?['activity']} | Malware Family: @{json(string(body('Enrich_Domain')))?['malware_family']} | Threat Actors: @{join(coalesce(json(string(body('Enrich_Domain')))?['threat_actors'], json('[]')), ', ')}

source.name: Check Point Exposure Management IoC Intelligence

metadata.title: Check Point Exposure Management - IoC Intelligence Enrichment and Triage
metadata.description: When a new Microsoft Sentinel incident is created, this playbook enriches IOC entities (IPs, domains, file hashes, URLs) using the Check Point Exposure Management IoC Intelligence enrichment API and adds a structured enrichment comment to the incident. The Premium API returns malicious classification, confidence (0-100), severity (0-5), kill-chain stage, malware family, threat actors, CVEs, and type-specific enrichment (geo/whois/file).
prerequisites: 1. A valid Check Point Exposure Management API token and base Argos URL (e.g. https://your-company.cyberint.io).
2. The Logic App Managed Identity must be granted Microsoft Sentinel Responder role on the resource group.
postDeployment: 1. Grant the Logic App Managed Identity the **Microsoft Sentinel Responder** role.
2. Configure an automation rule in Microsoft Sentinel to trigger this playbook on incident creation.

source.name: Check Point Exposure Management IoC Intelligence

releaseNotes.title: Check Point Exposure Management - IoC Intelligence Enrichment and Triage

properties.displayName: Check Point Exposure Management IoC Intelligence
properties.descriptionHtml:
Note: Please refer to the following before installing the solution:

• Review the solution Release Notes

• There may be known issues pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing.

Cyberint, a Check Point company, provides Microsoft Sentinel integration to streamline premium IOC ingestion and bring enriched threat intelligence from the Infinity External Risk Management solution into Microsoft Sentinel. The IoC Intelligence connector incrementally pulls high-fidelity indicators — IPs, domains, URLs, and file hashes — enriched with confidence, severity, malicious classification, kill-chain stage, blocking and uniqueness flags, malware types, and CVE/campaign associations.

Underlying Microsoft Technologies used:

This solution depends on the following technologies, and some of which may be in Preview state or may incur additional ingestion or operational costs:

  1. Codeless Connector Framework (used by the IoC Intelligence data connector to poll the Check Point Exposure Management API)

  2. Log Analytics custom logs via Data Collection Rules (DCR)

  3. Azure Logic Apps (used by the Check_Point_EM_IOCIntelligenceEnrichment playbook)

Data Connectors: 1, Playbooks: 1

Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel | Learn more about Solutions

source.name: Check Point Exposure Management IoC Intelligence
